gap_summaries: [ultrathink] FIXED 🟡 load_invariant_registry returned invalid entries after validation — added per-entry filtering via validate_invariant_entry; added test_filters_out_invalid_entries test case

[ultrathink] FIXED 🟡 burn_in_check._TEST_RESULT_RE only handles pytest output format (name::test PASSED|FAILED) — added inline comment documenting v1 limitation and graceful degradation for non-pytest runners
[ultrathink] 🔵 TEA review path _bmad/gate/tea/test-review.json is hardcoded — profile-configurable override not needed for v1; graceful pass when file absent
[ultrathink] 🔵 BURN_IN deterministic=True despite detecting non-deterministic behavior — correct per protocol (flag describes the checker, not the checked code)

[ultrathink] 🔵 No subprocess-mocked tests for burn_in_check.main() and mutation_check.main() — pure logic functions (detect_flaky, parse_*, check_threshold) fully tested; subprocess integration tested via collector pipeline
